heading: Conservation of Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park
label: 410iii–8 Conservation of Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park

children.heading: Encouragement of conservation
children.label: a Encouragement of conservation
children.text: The Secretary and the Commission shall encourage conservation of the historic and natural resources within and in proximity of the Park by landowners, local governments, organizations, and businesses.

children.heading: Provision of technical assistance
children.label: b Provision of technical assistance
children.text: The Secretary may provide technical assistance to local governments, in cooperative efforts which complement the values of the Park.
is consistent with the purposes of this subchapter and the standards and criteria established pursuant to the general management plan developed pursuant to ;section 410iii–6 of this title
is not likely to have an adverse effect on the resources of the Park; and
is likely to provide for full public participation in order to consider the views of all interested parties.
